concerns.text: FR-001: System MUST download and parse poll data from ` and archived RealClearPolitics sources into a unified format (See US-1). The backtick at the beginning of the sentence is invalid syntax and should be removed.

FR-007: System MUST frame findings as predictive accuracy and associational uncertainty, not causal voter influence (See US-3). This FR feels out of scope for a technical specification and reads more like a research guideline. It's weakly anchored to US-3 and could be considered orphaned.

FR-009: System MUST sweep significance threshold α ∈ {0.01, 0.05, 0.10} and report stability of headline improvement rates (See US-3). This FR is weakly anchored to US-3 and could be considered orphaned. The scope of 'headline improvement rates' is also vague.

SC-003: Statistical significance of method differences is measured via Diebold-Mariano test statistics with multiplicity correction (See US-3). This SC is weakly anchored to US-3 and could be considered orphaned. The phrase 'multiplicity correction' is not defined.
